    Role: Severity level ; if activated, the events with a severity level "abend" are outputed.
    Repository: CATStatisticsErrorlog
    Primary Tab Page: /General/General/Statistics
  • ERRORLOG_Activation
    Role: Activation state of the Errorlog statistics
    Repository: CATStatisticsErrorlog
    Primary Tab Page: /General/General/Statistics
  • ERRORLOG_CERR
    Role: Severity level ; if activated, the events with a severity level "critical error" are outputed.
    Repository: CATStatisticsErrorlog
    Primary Tab Page: /General/General/Statistics
  • ERRORLOG_CMND
    Role: If activated, the current command name is outputed.
    Repository: CATStatisticsErrorlog
    Primary Tab Page: /General/General/Statistics
  • ERRORLOG_COMT
    Role: Severity level ; if activated, the events with a severity level "comment" are outputed.
    Repository: CATStatisticsErrorlog
    Primary Tab Page: /General/General/Statistics

    Role: If activated, the cpu duration field is outputed.
    Repository: CATStatisticsErrorlog

    Role: Cumulation mode state of the Errorlog statistics

    Role: Format for the date and time field.
    Repository: CATStatisticsErrorlog
    Primary Tab Page: /General/General/Statistics
  • ERRORLOG_ELPS
    Role: If activated, the elapsed duration field is outputed.
    Repository: CATStatisticsErrorlog

  • ERRORLOG_Formating
    Role: Format of the Errorlog statistics
    Repository: CATStatisticsErrorlog
    Primary Tab Page: /General/General/Statistics

    Role: If activated, the host name field is outputed.
    Repository: CATStatisticsErrorlog

  • ERRORLOG_MSGE
    Role: If activated, the message field is outputed.
    Repository: CATStatisticsErrorlog

  • option.a1_
    Role: Analysis should end with Release of at least one hand (A1)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • option.a1_
    Role: Eye Action is always entered in Right Hand column (A1)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM2Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM2
  • option.a2_
    Role: Step is always entered in Right Hand column (A2)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM2Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM2
  • option.a3_
    Role: Bend and Arise is always entered in Right Hand column (A3)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM2Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM2
  • option.a4_
    Role: Get Weight should be associated with Get or Put (A4)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM2Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM2
  • option.a5_
    Role: Put Weight should be associated with Put (A5)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM2Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM2
  • option.a6_
    Role: Regrasp should not be assigned in conjunction with Apply Pressure (A6)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM2Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM2
  • option.a7_
    Role: Put Weight must have an associated Get Weight preceding it (A7)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM2Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM2
  • option.a8_
    Role: Combined Actions: Get/Put Weight is not limited out (A8)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM2Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM2
  • option.b1_
    Role: Same values for Move/Static Component bi-manual (B1)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • option.b2_
    Role: Move bi-manual must be entered for both hands (B2)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • option.b3_
    Role: G3 must not be executed with other motions of the hand simultaneously (B3)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • option.b4_
    Role: Process Time must not be executed with Process Time simultaneously (B4)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • option.b5_
    Role: Static Component bi-manual must be entered for both hands (B5)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • option.c10_
    Role: Grasp G4 always has to be executed with Reach R..C in advance (C10)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • option.c11_
    Role: On two consecutive Side Step, the first is always a Side Step case 2 (C11)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • option.c12_
    Role: On two consecutive Body Turn, the first is always a Body Turn case 2 (C12)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • option.c13_
    Role: Audit sequence of movements of the hand (C13)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • option.c14_
    Role: Static Component SC# is associated with Move with effort M-A/B/C# (C14)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • option.c15_
    Role: Reach R-A - Grasp G1B --> Check for correctness (C15)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • option.c1_
    Role: Move case C with Dynamic Component must not be executed with Position Easy (C1)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • option.c2_
    Role: Taking control over an object (Pinch Grasp) has to be decontroled by Release RL1 (C2)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • option.c3_
    Role: Taking control over an object (Contact Grasp) has to be decontroled by Release RL2 (C3)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • option.c4_
    Role: Static Component SC# (/2) has to be followed by Move M-A/B/C#(/2) (C4)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • option.c5_
    Role: Values * of Static Component SC* (/2) and values # of Move M-A/B/C#(/2) have to be equal (C5)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • option.c6_
    Role: Move M-A/B may not be executed with Position (C6)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • option.c7_
    Role: Audit sequence of Reach / Grasp (C7)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • option.c8_
    Role: Reach R-A/B/C/E may not be executed with Position (C8)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • option.c9_
    Role: Reach R-D may only be executed with Position symmetry S (C9)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • option.d1_
    Role: Grasp case G1C3 with Reach case D in advance (D1)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • option.d2_
    Role: Incorporate dimension at Grasp case 4 with Reach case C in advance (D2)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • option.d3_
    Role: Walk Unobstructed with Turn Body case 1 in advance (D3)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • option.d4_
    Role: Walk Obstructed/Weight with Turn Body case 2 followed by Turn Body case 1 in advance (D4)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • option.d5_
    Role: Do not limit out Grasp case G2, when distance of Move is smaller than 12 cm (D5)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • option.d6_
    Role: Distance of Reach is 10 cm with Side Step in advance (D6)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1

  • options.b4_
    Role: Process Time must not be executed with Process Time simultaneously (B4)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • options.b5_
    Role: Static Component bi-manual must be entered for both hands (B5)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • options.c10_
    Role: Grasp G4 always has to be executed with Reach R..C in advance (C10)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • options.c11_
    Role: On two consecutive Side Step, the first is always a Side Step case 2 (C11)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • options.c12_
    Role: On two consecutive Body Turn, the first is always a Body Turn case 2 (C12)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • options.c13_
    Role: Audit sequence of movements of the hand (C13)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • options.c14_
    Role: Static Component SC# is associated with Move with effort M-A/B/C# (C14)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • options.c15_
    Role: Reach R-A - Grasp G1B --> Check for correctness (C15)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • options.c1_
    Role: Move case C with Dynamic Component must not be executed with Position Easy (C1)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • options.c2_
    Role: Taking control over an object (Pinch Grasp) has to be decontroled by Release RL1 (C2)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • options.c3_
    Role: Taking control over an object (Contact Grasp) has to be decontroled by Release RL2 (C3)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • options.c4_
    Role: Static Component SC# (/2) has to be followed by Move M-A/B/C#(/2) (C4)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • options.c5_
    Role: Values * of Static Component SC* (/2) and values # of Move M-A/B/C#(/2) have to be equal (C5)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • options.c6_
    Role: Move M-A/B may not be executed with Position (C6)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • options.c7_
    Role: Audit sequence of Reach / Grasp (C7)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • options.c8_
    Role: Reach R-A/B/C/E may not be executed with Position (C8)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • options.c9_
    Role: Reach R-D may only be executed with Position symmetry S (C9)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • options.d1_
    Role: Grasp case G1C3 with Reach case D in advance (D1)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • options.d2_
    Role: Incorporate dimension at Grasp case 4 with Reach case C in advance (D2)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • options.d3_
    Role: Walk Unobstructed with Turn Body case 1 in advance (D3)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • options.d4_
    Role: Walk Obstructed / Weight with Turn Body case 2 followed by Turn Body case 1 in advance (D4)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • options.d5_
    Role: Do not limit out Grasp case G2, when distance of Move is smaller than 12 cm (D5)
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
  • options.d6_
    Role: Distance of Reach is 10 cm with Side Step in advance (D6)"
    Repository: DELTimeAnalysisMTM1Options
    Primary Tab Page: /Manufacturing Planning/Standard Time Measurement/MTM1
